task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure GCompris difficulty filter to maximum level 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: GCompris settings or configuration screen is visible, with the difficulty filter (often represented by stars or a slider) set to a maximum of 3.

task_completion.description: Navigate to Math/Numbers and Language/ABC categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: GCompris interface showing the activity selection screen for either the Math (numbers/counting/sheep icon) or Language (letters/reading/ABC icon) categories.

task_completion.description: Run at least two activities to verify appropriateness
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively inside at least two distinct GCompris activities (actual gameplay or activity screens, not just the menu).

task_completion.description: Create an Individual Accommodation Plan at ~/Desktop/accommodation_plan.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open, editing a file named 'accommodation_plan.txt' located on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Document the difficulty settings and accessible Math and Language activities
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains written documentation specifying the difficulty setting (level 3) and lists specific Math and Language activities found in GCompris.

task_completion.description: Document a recommended 5-day weekly activity schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a schedule covering 5 days (e.g., Monday-Friday or Day 1-Day 5) with specific activities assigned to each day.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the GCompris GUI to explore activities
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris application window open and being interacted with, rather than the agent just guessing activity names or reading configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually ran the activities as requested
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual gameplay/activity screens of GCompris, proving the agent didn't just look at the menu.

integrity.description: Verifies the accommodation plan contains genuine observations
integrity.visual_evidence: The activities listed in the text file correspond to actual GCompris activities visible in the screenshots, rather than generic or hallucinated names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is an educational software suite. Its difficulty filtering system supports levels 1-6. The task requires reducing the maximum difficulty to 3 (showing only levels 1-3). The accommodation plan must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/accommodation_plan.txt and be at least 350 bytes in size. The user acts as a Special Education Teacher.
